backward_compatibility.rationale: All changes must be feature-gated with config defaults matching current behavior (v1.14 ai_solve pattern). Absent key = current behavior.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No legacy code to remove — all changes are additive config keys and algorithm extensions.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous panel approval. Parallel Tracks expanded: 12 PI items across 4 phases. Phase A: PI-1 + PI-3 + PI-4 + PI-10. DF-2/3/4/5 reclassified to implement per user decision (2026-03-15).

rc_fixes.CRA-1: resolved — board_size parameter added to identify_candidates()

rc_fixes.RC-1_CRA-1: resolved — tautological MH-4 test replaced with behavioral build_solution_tree() test
rc_fixes.RC-2_CRA-3: resolved — adaptive/boost override documented in AGENTS.md PI-2

rc_fixes.RC-1_CRA-1: resolved — disagreement metric changed to sibling winrate comparison
rc_fixes.RC-2_CRA-2: resolved — PI-8 merge re-sorts by policy_prior before capping
rc_fixes.CRB-1: resolved — redundant None check removed at PI-12

scope_revision.change: DF-2/3/4/5 reclassified from deferred to implement (PI-9/10/11/12). Scope expanded from 8 to 12 PI items, 3 to 4 phases. PI-10 composition formula refined (Gate 5): 12 condition-keyed templates, 5 emit opponent-response, 7 suppress, VP-1 through VP-5 voice principles established.
